title: mentha mutelii
intro: Mentha mutelii, also known as 'Pennyroyal', is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include acting as a natural antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive aid, as well as being a natural insect repellent. The health benefits of Mentha mutelii include alleviating symptoms of digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as providing relief from headaches and menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, Mentha mutelii is often used to make teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used to soothe various health issues or add a refreshing flavor to drinks.
